scenarios.title: Full review uses orchestrator and does not recursively follow companion links
scenarios.expected: Agent runs fifteen lenses once in workflow order and deduplicates findings.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-full-solution-review. Scenario: Full review uses orchestrator and does not recursively follow companion links. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Agent runs fifteen lenses once in workflow order and deduplicates findings.

scenarios.title: Companion graph is not treated as traversal loop
scenarios.expected: Agent refuses to loop backward from reporting to audit except as final summary.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-full-solution-review. Scenario: Companion graph is not treated as traversal loop. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Agent refuses to loop backward from reporting to audit except as final summary.

scenarios.title: Clean codebase with no major findings
scenarios.expected: Expected zero critical or major findings; produces a concise report of only Informational observations.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-full-solution-review. Scenario: Clean codebase with no major findings. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected zero critical or major findings; produces a concise report of only Informational observations.

scenarios.title: Cross-skill finding deduplication
scenarios.expected: Expected orchestrator to merge overlapping analyzer, code-quality, and solid-deep findings into single actionable items.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-full-solution-review. Scenario: Cross-skill finding deduplication. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected orchestrator to merge overlapping analyzer, code-quality, and solid-deep findings into single actionable items.

scenarios.title: Evidence requirement enforcement across skills
scenarios.expected: Expected performance and allocation issues lacking evidence to be explicitly routed to 'Measure' tasks instead of 'Refactor'.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-full-solution-review. Scenario: Evidence requirement enforcement across skills. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected performance and allocation issues lacking evidence to be explicitly routed to 'Measure' tasks instead of 'Refactor'.
